name: dopamine-fluid
description: Dopamine Fluid — generate fluid CSS and grid layouts from class names

scripts.build: npm run dopamine && npm run sass
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:dopamine && npm run docs:sass
scripts.docs:dev: concurrently "npm run docs:dopamine -- --watch" "npm run docs:sass -- --watch" "browser-sync start --server docs --files 'docs/css/**/*.css' 'docs/*.html' --startPath index.html --no-notify"
scripts.dev:ddev: concurrently "npm run dopamine -- --watch" "npm run sass -- --watch" "browser-sync start --proxy $DDEV_URL --port $BS_PORT --files 'css/**/*.css' --no-notify"
